Metadata.title: International Shopping Platform
Metadata.description: A multilingual frontend for cross-border shopping.

HomePage.title: Welcome to International Shopping
HomePage.description: Choose an entry to sign in, register, or manage your account and addresses.

unauthorized.title: Login is required
unauthorized.description: Your session is missing or expired. Sign in and retry.

csrf.title: Security validation failed
csrf.description: CSRF validation failed. Refresh and submit again.

rateLimit.title: Too many requests
rateLimit.description: Request frequency is limited. Please retry later.

server.title: Service temporarily unavailable
server.description: Upstream service failed. Retry and report the trace ID if it persists.

unknown.title: Request failed
unknown.description: The request failed unexpectedly. Retry or contact support with trace ID.

shell.title: Get back to your cross-border shopping workspace
shell.description: Social login comes first. Email login stays available as a secondary path in the same card.

highlights.track: Order and logistics status stay in sync
highlights.secure: Session and security validation are handled consistently

fields.activationEmailPlaceholder: Email to receive the activation code

errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.oauthAuthorizeMissing: Authorization URL is missing. Please retry.
errors.loginFailed: Sign-in failed. Check your account and password.
errors.activationEmailRequired: Enter a valid email before resending.

shell.title: Register once and continue with orders and addresses
shell.description: The flow is split into registration and activation so users do not get lost between inbox and page.

highlights.orders: Track order progress right after activation
highlights.addresses: Address book is ready for fast checkout
highlights.support: Support and after-sales entry points stay visible

card.title: Create Account
card.subtitle: Social signup first. Email signup remains as fallback.

fields.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. Include letters and numbers when possible.

verify.title: Verify Email
verify.manualHint: Status auto-polls for 60 seconds, then you can refresh manually.

messages.activationSent: Registration accepted. Activation email is being sent.

errors.passwordRule: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.usernameRule: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.phonePair: Phone country code and phone number must be provided together
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.oauthAuthorizeMissing: Authorization URL is missing. Please retry.
errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use
errors.usernameTaken: This username is already in use
errors.phoneTaken: This phone number is already in use
errors.registerFailed: Registration failed. Check your input and retry.
errors.activationEmailRequired: Activation email is missing. Return to edit.
errors.verifyCodeInvalid: Verification code is invalid or expired.

shell.title: Complete recovery in one route
shell.description: Send code by account, then reset password without jumping across multiple pages.

highlights.recovery: Recover session in two focused steps
highlights.security: A new session is established after reset
highlights.resume: Users can continue their original task directly

card.title: Forgot Password
card.subtitle: Send a code first, then set a new password.

messages.requestAccepted: If the account exists, the code will be sent to its bound email.

errors.newPasswordRule: New password must be at least 6 characters
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.codeInvalid: Verification code is invalid or expired.

card.title: Completing OAuth
card.subtitle: We are confirming your session and preparing the redirect.

errors.providerMissing: Missing OAuth provider. Please restart sign-in.
errors.callbackFailed: OAuth callback processing failed. Please retry.
errors.sessionNotEstablished: Session is not established. Please sign in again.

shell.title: Orders, addresses, security and after-sales start here
shell.description: Phase 1 keeps the first screen task-oriented so users can reach orders, addresses, security and support quickly.

orders.title: Orders & Shipping
orders.description: The filter entry points land first. Full order UI can plug in later without changing IA.

addresses.title: Address Book
addresses.description: Confirm a default address first so the account becomes checkout-ready.
addresses.empty: No default-address summary is available yet. Open the address route to complete it.

security.title: Payments & Security
security.description: Phase 1 ships OAuth bindings and security entry points first. The payments page stays as a shell route.
security.noBindings: No bound OAuth sign-in methods are available yet.
security.passwordHint: Password change still reuses the `/forgot-password` flow. The full UI will be reconnected once the auth pages are restored.

support.title: Support & After-sales
support.description: Keep refund, shipping issue and contact-support entries visible from day one.

profile.title: Account Basics
profile.description: This low-priority section keeps core identity details without competing with service entry points.

errors.loadFailedDescription: Static entry shells are shown instead. Code: {code}; Trace ID: {traceId}

shell.title: Complete a default address before continuing checkout
shell.description: This route delivers the list, onboarding hint and dedicated create/edit route states first. Full form UI comes later.

onboarding.title: Finish a default address to continue ordering
onboarding.completed: A default address is already available. You can resume the interrupted task.
onboarding.pending: A default address is still missing. Please enter the create route state first.

routeOnly.title: This phase ships routes and API scaffolding first
routeOnly.description: Create and edit are reserved as dedicated route states. Google autocomplete, map pick and full forms will be connected later.

intent.createDescription: This placeholder is reserved for the dedicated form layer and its Google-related extension fields.
intent.editDescription: This placeholder is reserved for the dedicated edit form layer and its update endpoint.
intent.editDescriptionWithReceiver: Current editing target: {receiver}. This placeholder is reserved for the dedicated edit form layer and its update endpoint.

ready.title: Default address is ready
ready.description: You can return to the account hub or continue the task that was interrupted earlier.

empty.title: No addresses yet
empty.description: Open the create address route state first. The full form UI will follow later.

cards.actionsReady: Set-default / delete BFF routes are ready

shell.title: Stabilize the order filter entry points first
shell.description: The five states from the account hub land on `/orders` first, so the IA stays stable when the order domain ships later.

filters.title: Status filters
filters.description: The current shell expresses filter state through query parameters.

active.title: Active placeholder state
active.description: The route already accepts jumps from the account page and can later be replaced by the real order list.
active.placeholder: The order UI is not expanded in this phase. This page keeps the filtered route and return actions stable.

shell.title: Preserve the payments entry without shipping fake features
shell.description: Phase 1 keeps this route as a shell while the real capabilities remain in the account security module.

phase1.title: Phase 1 scope
phase1.description: Real capabilities in this phase are still OAuth bindings and security entry points. Payment methods remain reserved for later phases.
phase1.note: This avoids fake buttons on the account page while stabilizing the future payments route semantics.

shell.title: Keep help entry points visible before the support domain lands
shell.description: This phase provides stable entry points and query-based routing first. The customerservice domain can plug in later without changing account IA.

topics.title: Help topics
topics.description: The three support entries from the account hub all converge here.

active.title: Active placeholder state
active.description: The selected topic is already preserved in the query string.
active.placeholder: The customerservice UI is not included in this phase yet. This route keeps a stable entry point and return path.
